CustomField.description: Set by the JSI-89 tribute-matching automation when a honoree or notification recipient matched 2+ existing Contacts (ambiguous). The lookup was left blank for a person to resolve manually. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-checked when the tribute contact matcher found multiple possible Contacts. Review and set the Honoree/Notification Recipient lookup manually, then uncheck.
CustomField.label: Tribute Contact Needs Review
